description: Offline versioned RxNorm verification fixture for the four SGLT2 inhibitor RxCUIs present in the demo phenotype. These records represent expected RxNorm API responses as of the curated_at date.
notes: These fixture responses are manually curated from the RxNorm REST API documentation and publicly known RxCUI values.
They are NOT guaranteed to match the current live RxNorm database. Always verify against the live API before clinical use.
The four RxCUIs covered (empagliflozin 2200644, dapagliflozin 1488564, canagliflozin 1373458, ertugliflozin 1992819) are ingredient-level concepts.
A fifth entry (RXCUI_NOT_FOUND: 9999999) is included to test the not-found path.
